enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative
Banks - Income Recognition, Asset Classification and Provisioning) Directions,
2025.
enriched_requirements.object: Bank of India (Urban Co-operative Banks - Income Recognition, Asset Classification and Provisioning) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
enriched_requirements.object: immediate effect

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be applicable to Urban Co-operative Banks (hereinafter
collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank').
enriched_requirements.object: Co-operative Banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In this context, urban co-operative banks shall mean Primary Co-operative Banks
as defined under section 5(ccv) read with Section 56 of Banking Regulation Act,
1949.
enriched_requirements.object: as defined under section 5(ccv) read with Section 56 of Banking Regulation Act, 1949

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall follow the requirements of the State Co-operative Societies Acts
and / or rules made thereunder, or other statutory enactments, if they are more
stringent than those prescribed hereby.
enriched_requirements.object: the State Co-operative Societies Acts and / or rules made thereunder, or other statutory enactments

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall also follow the prudential guidelines on income recognition, asset
classification and provisioning of advances for restructured accounts as
<image>
prescribed in the Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative Banks - Resolution
of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025, in addition to these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: guidelines on income recognition, asset classification and provisioning of advances for restructured accounts as <image> pr

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In these Directions, unless the context states otherwise, the terms herein shall
bear the meaning assigned to them below:
(1) 'crop season' for each crop, shall mean the period up to harvesting of
the crops raised, as determined by the State Level Bankers' Committee
(SLBC) in each State;
enriched_requirements.object: to them below: (1) 'crop season' for each crop, shall mean the period up to harvesting of the crops raised, as determined by

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) 'doubtful asset' shall mean an asset which has remained in the
substandard category for a period of twelve months;
enriched_requirements.object: has remained in the substandard category for a period of twelve months

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) 'exposure' shall include all funded and non-funded exposures (including
underwriting and similar commitments).
enriched_requirements.object: non-funded exposures (including underwriting and similar commitments)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) 'long duration crops' shall mean crops with crop season longer than one
year;
enriched_requirements.object: season longer than one year

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(5) 'loss asset' shall mean an asset where loss has been identified by the
bank / the internal / external auditors / the Department of Co-operation
or the inspection conducted by the Reserve Bank, but the amount has
not been written off wholly by the bank;
enriched_requirements.object: loss has been identified by the bank / the internal / external auditors / the Department of Co-operation or the inspection conduct

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(6) 'non-performing asset' shall mean an asset, including a leased asset,
which has ceased to generate income for a bank;
enriched_requirements.object: a leased asset, which has ceased to generate income for a bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(7) 'out of order status' - a cash credit / overdraft (CC / OD) account shall
be treated as 'out of order' if any of the following conditions are satisfied:
Explanation 1: 'Previous 90 days period' referred to in (iii) above
shall be inclusive of the day for which the day-end process is being
run.
enriched_requirements.object: of order' if any of the following conditions are satisfied: Explanation 1: 'Previous 90 days period' referred to in (iii) above sha

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation 2: The definition of 'out of order' shall be applicable to
all credit products being offered as an overdraft facility, including
those not meant for business purpose and/or which entail interest
repayments as the only credits.
enriched_requirements.object: credit products being offered as an overdraft facility, including those not meant for business purpose and/or which entail intere

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(8) 'overdue' status - any amount due to a bank under any credit facility shall
be treated as 'overdue' if it is not paid on the due date fixed by the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: if it is not paid on the due date fixed by the bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(9) 'security' shall mean tangible security properly charged to the bank and
will not include intangible securities like guarantees (including State
government guarantees), comfort letters, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: charged to the bank and will not include intangible securities like guarantees (including State government guarantees)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(10) 'short duration crops' shall mean crops which are not 'long duration'
crops;
enriched_requirements.object: not 'long duration' crops

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(11) 'substandard asset' shall mean an asset, which has remained NPA for a
period less than or equal to twelve months;
enriched_requirements.object: has remained NPA for a period less than or equal to twelve months

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The definitions of the terms 'Micro Enterprises', 'Small Enterprises', and 'Medium
Enterprises' shall be in terms of the circular FIDD.MSME &
NFS.BC.No.3/06.02.31/2020-21 dated July 2, 2020 on 'Credit flow to Micro,
Small and Medium Enterprises Sector' as updated from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: the circular FIDD

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The terms 'credit event' and 'default' shall have the same meaning as assigned
to it in the Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative Banks - Resolution of
Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: as assigned to it in the Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The terms 'Commercial Real Estate (CRE)', 'Commercial Real Estate -
Residential Housing Sector (CRE - RH)', 'project finance', and 'financial closure'
shall have the same meaning assigned to them in the Reserve Bank of India
(Urban Co-operative Banks - Credit Facilities) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: assigned to them in the Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative Banks - Credit Facilities) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All other expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meaning as
have been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or the
Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934, or the Companies Act, 2013, or any statutory
modification or re-enactment thereto or other regulations issued by the Reserve
Bank or the Glossary of Terms published by the Reserve Bank or as used in
commercial parlance, as the case may be.
enriched_requirements.object: as have been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934, or the Companies Ac

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall frame a Board approved policy for the implementation of these
Directions, which shall inter alia include the following principles / components:
(1) the policy of income recognition shall be objective and based on record
of recovery rather than on any subjective considerations;
enriched_requirements.object: policy for the implementation of these Directions, which shall inter alia include the following principles / components: (1) th

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Board of Directors of a bank shall set cut-off limits for advances to be treated
as 'larger advances' and finalise names of external agencies for annual stock
audits for the purpose of paragraph 62.
enriched_requirements.object: advances to be treated as 'larger advances' and finalise names of external agencies for annual stock audits for the purpose of

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall comply with the following instructions in respect of all loans
sanctioned on or after December 31, 2021:
(1) The exact due dates for repayment of a loan, frequency of repayment,
breakup between principal and interest, examples of dates of
classification as special mention account (SMA) / non-performing asset
(NPA), etc.
enriched_requirements.object: instructions in respect of all loans sanctioned on or after December 31, 2021: (1) The exact due dates for repayment of a lo

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: shall be clearly specified in the loan agreement.
enriched_requirements.object: the loan agreement

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The borrower shall be apprised of the same at the time of loan sanction
and also at the time of subsequent changes, if any, to the sanction
terms/loan agreement till full repayment of the loan.
enriched_requirements.object: same at the time of loan sanction and also at the time of subsequent changes

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) In cases of loan facilities with moratorium on payment of principal and/or
interest, the exact date of commencement of repayment shall also be
specified in the loan agreements.
enriched_requirements.object: the loan agreements

conditions: In case of loans sanctioned before December 31
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of loans sanctioned before December 31, 2021, compliance to the
instructions in paragraph 13 shall be ensured as and when such loans become
due for renewal/review.
enriched_requirements.object: when such loans become due for renewal/review

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall apply the following principles in respect of working capital accounts
sanctioned by them:
<image>
(1) Drawings in the working capital accounts are covered by the adequacy
of current assets;
enriched_requirements.object: in respect of working capital accounts sanctioned by them: <image> (1) Drawings in the working capital accounts are cov

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Drawing power shall be arrived at based on the stock statement which is
current;
enriched_requirements.object: on the stock statement which is current
months

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) The outstanding in the account based on drawing power calculated from
stock statements older than three months, shall be deemed as irregular.

conditions:
In case of constraints such as non-availability of financial statements and other
data from the borrowers
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of constraints such as non-availability of financial statements and other
data from the borrowers, the bank shall furnish evidence to show that renewal/
review of credit limits is already on and would be completed soon.
enriched_requirements.object: that renewal/ review of credit limits is already on and would be completed soon

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall strictly adhere to the Board approved policy on methodology and
periodicity for review / renewal of credit facilities within the overall regulatory
guidelines.
enriched_requirements.object: Board approved policy on methodology and periodicity for review / renewal of credit facilities within the overall regulatory gu

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall avoid frequent and repeated ad-hoc / short review / renewal of credit
facilities without justifiable reasons.
enriched_requirements.object: ad-hoc / short review / renewal of credit facilities without justifiable reasons

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall capture all the data relating to regular as well as ad-hoc / short
review / renewal of credit facilities in its core banking systems / management
information systems and make the same available for scrutiny as and when
required by any audit or inspection by Auditors / the Reserve Bank.
enriched_requirements.object: relating to regular as well as ad-hoc / short review / renewal of credit facilities in its core banking systems / management info

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the
processes governing review / renewal of credit facilities shall be brought under
the scope of concurrent / internal audit / internal control mechanism of the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: scope of concurrent / internal audit / internal control mechanism of the bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall implement the following instructions for increasing awareness
among the borrowers:
(1) place consumer education literature on its websites, explaining with
examples, the concepts of date of overdue, special mention account and
non-performing asset classification and upgradation, with specific
reference to day-end process;
enriched_requirements.object: for increasing awareness among the borrowers: (1) place consumer education literature on its websites, explaining

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) consider displaying such consumer education literature in its branches
by means of posters and / or other appropriate media;
enriched_requirements.object: or other appropriate media

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall make suitable disclosures in their Notes to Accounts as per the
requirements contained in the Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative Banks
- Financial Statements: Presentation and Disclosures) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: their Notes to Accounts as per the requirements contained in the Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative Banks - Financ

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall classify a loan or an advance as a standard asset or a non-
performing asset, as the case may be.
enriched_requirements.object: an advance as a standard asset or a non- performing asset, as the case may be

conditions:
if so, as part of their day-end
processes for the due date
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall flag a borrower account as overdue, if so, as part of their day-end
processes for the due date, irrespective of the time of running such processes.
enriched_requirements.object: as overdue

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Similarly, classification of borrower accounts as SMA as well as NPA shall be
done as part of day-end process for the relevant date and the SMA or NPA
classification date shall be the calendar date for which the day end process is
run.
enriched_requirements.object: of day-end process for the relevant date and the SMA or NPA classification date shall be the calendar date for which the day end proce

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Thus, the date of SMA/NPA shall reflect the asset classification status of an
account at the day-end of that calendar date.
enriched_requirements.object: status of an account at the day-end of that calendar date

conditions: If due date of a loan account is March 31
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Illustration I:
If due date of a loan account is March 31, 2021, and full dues are
not received before the bank runs the day-end process for this date, the date of
overdue shall be March 31, 2021.

conditions: If it continues to remain overdue
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If it continues to remain overdue, then this
account shall get tagged as SMA-1 upon running day-end process on April 30,
2021 i.e.
enriched_requirements.object: upon running day-end process on April 30, 2021 i

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Accordingly,
the date of SMA-1 classification for that account shall be April 30, 2021.

conditions: if the account continues to remain overdue

if continues to remain
overdue further
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Similarly, if the account continues to remain overdue, it shall get tagged as SMA-
2 upon running day-end process on May 30, 2021 and if continues to remain
overdue further, it shall get classified as NPA upon running day-end process on
June 29, 2021.
enriched_requirements.object: 2 upon running day-end process on May 30, 2021 and if continues to remain overdue further, it shall get classified as NPA upon runn

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank having total assets of ₹2000 crore or above as on March 31, 2020 shall
have implemented system-based asset classification by June 30, 2021.
enriched_requirements.object: classification by June 30, 2021

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: 'System-based asset classification' shall mean asset classification
(downgrading as well as upgrading) carried out by the Core Banking System
(CBS) / computerized systems of the bank in an automated manner on an
ongoing basis.
enriched_requirements.object: as well as upgrading) carried out by the Core Banking System (CBS) / computerized systems of the bank in an aut

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank having total assets of ₹1000 crore or above and having self-assessed
themselves as being under Level III or Level IV in terms of the circular
<image>
DoS.CO/CSITE/BC.4083/31.01.052/2019-20 dated December 31, 2019 on
Comprehensive Cyber Security Framework for banks shall have implemented
system-based asset classification by September 30, 2021.
enriched_requirements.object: classification by September 30, 2021

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank which meets the criteria in paragraph 27 as at the end of the financial
year 2020-2021 or subsequent financial years shall implement system-based
asset classification within a period of six months from the end of the financial
year concerned.
enriched_requirements.object: within a period of six months from the end of the financial year concerned

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For smooth implementation of the system-based asset classification system, a
bank shall conduct pilot/parallel run and evaluate the results for
accuracy/integrity of the asset classification in compliance with the applicable
RBI instructions to ensure that they are ready for implementation of the system
from the appointed date.
enriched_requirements.object: evaluate the results for accuracy/integrity of the asset classification in compliance with the applicable RBI instructi

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank, which is not required to implement system-based asset classification,
should establish appropriate internal systems to eliminate the tendency to delay
or postpone the identification of NPAs, especially in respect of high value
accounts.
enriched_requirements.object: to eliminate the tendency to delay or postpone the identification of NPAs, especially in respect of high value

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall fix a minimum cut-off point to decide what would
constitute a high value account depending upon their respective business levels.
enriched_requirements.object: point to decide what would constitute a high value account depending upon their respective business levels

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The cut-off point should be valid for the entire accounting year.
enriched_requirements.object: entire accounting year

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Responsibility and validation levels for ensuring proper asset classification shall
be fixed by the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The system shall ensure that doubts in asset classification due to any reason are
settled through specified internal channels within one month from the date on
which the account would have been classified as NPA as per extant guidelines.
enriched_requirements.object: asset classification due to any reason are settled through specified internal channels within one month from the date on which t

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall classify a loan or an advance as non-performing asset if any of the
following conditions are satisfied:
(1) interest and / or installment of principal remain overdue for a period of
more than 90 days in respect of a term loan;
enriched_requirements.object: an advance as non-performing asset if any of the following conditions are satisfied: (1) interest and / or installment of principal

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In addition to the conditions in paragraph 34, an account may also be classified
as NPA in terms of certain specific provisions of these Directions, including inter
alia paragraphs 46 to 53 as well as instructions contained in the Reserve Bank
of India (Urban Co-operative Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions,
2025.
enriched_requirements.object: NPA in terms of certain specific provisions of these Directions, including inter alia paragraphs 46 to 53 as well as instruction

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Asset classification shall be borrower-wise and not facility-wise.
enriched_requirements.object: facility-wise

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All the facilities
granted by a bank to a borrower and investments made in all the securities issued
by the borrower shall have to be treated as NPA / Non-Performing Investment
(NPI) and not the particular facility/investment or part thereof which has become
irregular.
enriched_requirements.object: as NPA / Non-Performing Investment (NPI) and not the particular facility/investment or part thereof which has become irregular

conditions: where there is a threat of loss
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In addition to the principles in paragraph 35, where there is a threat of loss, or
the recoverability of the advances is in doubt, the asset should be treated as
NPA.
The classification of an asset as NPA shall be based on the record of recovery.
enriched_requirements.object: record of recovery

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall not classify an advance account as NPA merely due to the existence
of some deficiencies which are temporary in nature such as non-availability of
adequate drawing power based on the latest available stock statement, balance
outstanding exceeding the limit temporarily, non-submission of stock statements
and non-renewal of the limits on the due date, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: as NPA merely due to the existence of some deficiencies which are temporary in nature such as non-availability of adequate

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall ensure that identification of NPAs is done on an on-going basis and
accounts are classified as NPA immediately, as soon as they turn into NPA as
per the guidelines contained in these Directions, without waiting till the end of
quarter/financial year.
enriched_requirements.object: NPAs is done on an on-going basis and accounts are classified as NPA immediately, as soon as they turn into NPA as per t

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall report the figures of NPAs to the Regional Office of the Reserve
Bank at the end of each year within two months from the close of the year in the
prescribed proforma given in the Annex - I.
enriched_requirements.object: NPAs to the Regional Office of the Reserve Bank at the end of each year within two months from the close of the year in the pres

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall ensure scrupulous compliance with the instructions for recognition
of credit impairment and view aberrations by dealing officials seriously.
enriched_requirements.object: the instructions for recognition of credit impairment and view aberrations by dealing officials seriously

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The asset classification of borrowal accounts where a solitary or a few credits
are recorded before the balance sheet date shall be handled with care and
without scope for subjectivity.
enriched_requirements.object: and without scope for subjectivity

conditions:
Where the account indicates inherent weakness on the basis of the data
available
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Where the account indicates inherent weakness on the basis of the data
available, the account shall be deemed as NPA.

In other genuine cases, a bank shall furnish satisfactory evidence to the Statutory
Auditors/Inspecting Officers about the manner of regularisation of the account to
eliminate doubts on their performing status.
enriched_requirements.object: the Statutory Auditors/Inspecting Officers about the manner of regularisation of the account to eliminate doubts on t

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Advances under consortium arrangements
<image>
(1) Asset classification of accounts under consortium or multiple banking
arrangements shall be based on the record of recovery of the individual
member and other aspects having a bearing on the recoverability of the
advances.
enriched_requirements.object: record of recovery of the individual member and other aspects having a bearing on the recoverability of the advances

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) A bank participating in the consortium shall, therefore, arrange to get
their share of recovery transferred from the lead bank or get an express
consent from the lead bank for the transfer of their share of recovery, to
ensure proper asset classification in their respective books.
enriched_requirements.object: get their share of recovery transferred from the lead bank or get an express consent from the lead bank for the transfer of th

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Agricultural advances
(1) The NPA norms as per sub-paragraphs 34(6) and 34(7) shall be
applicable only to the following direct agricultural advances:
enriched_requirements.object: the following direct agricultural advances:

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
This shall
include traditional/non-traditional plantations, horticulture and
allied activities.
enriched_requirements.object: and allied activities

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iii) In respect of agricultural loans other than those specified in sub-
paragraph (i), identification of NPAs shall be done on the same
basis as non-agricultural advances.
enriched_requirements.object: same basis as non-agricultural advances

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Depending upon the duration of crops raised by an agriculturist, the NPA
norms as per sub-paragraphs 34(6) and 34(7) shall also be made
applicable to agricultural term loans availed of by them.
enriched_requirements.object: to agricultural term loans availed of by them

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) A bank shall ensure that while granting loans and advances, realistic
repayment schedules are fixed on the basis of cash flows / fluidity with
the borrowers.
enriched_requirements.object: loans and advances, realistic repayment schedules are fixed on the basis of cash flows / fluidity with the borrowers

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Government guaranteed advances
(1) The credit facilities backed by guarantee of the Central Government
though overdue shall be treated as NPA only when the Government
repudiates its guarantee when invoked.
enriched_requirements.object: only when the Government repudiates its guarantee when invoked

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) State Government guaranteed advances and investments in State
Government guaranteed securities shall attract asset classification and
provisioning norms if interest and / or principal or any other amount due
to the bank remains overdue for more than 90 days.
enriched_requirements.object: provisioning norms if interest and / or principal or any other amount due to the bank remains overdue for more than 9

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Such loans / advances should be classified as NPA only when there is a
default in repayment of instalment of principal or payment of interest on
the respective due dates.
enriched_requirements.object: only when there is a default in repayment of instalment of principal or payment of interest on the respective due dates

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Gold loans
(1) A bank shall fix monthly / quarterly instalments for repayment of gold
loans for non-agricultural purposes taking into account the pattern of
income generation and repayment capacity of the borrowers and such
gold loan accounts shall be treated as NPAs if instalments of principal
and / or interest thereon are overdue for more than 90 days.
enriched_requirements.object: instalments for repayment of gold loans for non-agricultural purposes taking into account the pattern of income generation and

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) In respect of gold loans granted for agricultural purposes, interest shall
be charged at yearly intervals and payment shall coincide with the
harvesting of crops.
enriched_requirements.object: intervals and payment shall coincide with the harvesting of crops

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) Such advances shall be treated as NPA only if instalments of principal
and / or interest become overdue after due date.
enriched_requirements.object: only if instalments of principal and / or interest become overdue after due date

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Transfer of Loan Exposures - The asset classification and provisioning
requirements in respect of transactions involving transfer of loans shall be as per
the Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative Banks - Transfer and Distribution
of Credit Risk) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative Banks - Transfer and Distribution of Credit Risk) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Credit Card Accounts
(1) A bank shall report a credit card account as 'past due' to credit
information companies (CICs) or levy penal charges, viz.
enriched_requirements.object: account as 'past due' to credit information companies (CICs) or levy penal charges, viz

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The number of 'days overdue' and late payment charges shall, however,
be computed from the payment due date mentioned in the credit card
statement.
enriched_requirements.object: from the payment due date mentioned in the credit card statement

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If a resolution plan is implemented in adherence to the provisions of Chapter
IV-A of Reserve Bank of India (Urban Cooperative Banks - Resolution of
Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025 dated November 28, 2025, borrower
accounts which are classified as 'Standard' may be retained as such upon
implementation.
enriched_requirements.object: upon implementation

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Borrower accounts which may have slipped into NPA between
the date of occurrence of the calamity and implementation of the resolution
plan, shall be upgraded as 'Standard', upon implementation of the resolution
plan.
enriched_requirements.object: upon implementation of the resolution plan

conditions: Provided that after implementation of the resolution plan
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that after implementation of the resolution plan, the subsequent asset
classification shall be governed by the criteria laid out in these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: criteria laid out in these Directions

conditions:
where a subsequent restructuring
is necessitated under the provisions of Chapter IV-A of the aforesaid Directions
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Accounts which are restructured under paragraph 99E to 99L of the Reserve
Bank of India (Urban Cooperative Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets)
Directions, 2025 dated November 28, 2025, where a subsequent restructuring
is necessitated under the provisions of Chapter IV-A of the aforesaid Directions,
shall continue to be classified as 'Standard'.]
3 Inserted with effect from July 1, 2026, vide Reserve Bank of India (Urban Cooperative Banks - Income Recognition, Asset Classification and Provisioning) Amendment Directions, 2026.
enriched_requirements.object: as 'Standard'

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: A bank shall classify its NPAs further into 'substandard assets';
enriched_requirements.object: into 'substandard assets'

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A loss asset is considered un-collectible and of such little value that its
continuance as a bankable asset is not warranted although there may be some
salvage or recovery value.
enriched_requirements.object: recovery value

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Classification of assets into above categories should be done taking into account
the degree of well-defined credit weaknesses.
enriched_requirements.object: account the degree of well-defined credit weaknesses

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Notwithstanding paragraph 38, in respect of accounts where there are potential
threats for recovery on account of erosion in the value of security or non-
availability of security and existence of other factors such as frauds committed
by borrowers, the asset should be straightaway classified as doubtful or loss
asset as appropriate.
enriched_requirements.object: doubtful or loss asset as appropriate

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of paragraph 59, the following shall apply:
(1) erosion in the value of security shall be reckoned as significant when the
realisable value of the security is less than 50 per cent of the value
assessed by the bank or accepted by the Reserve Bank at the time of
<image>
last inspection, as the case may be.
enriched_requirements.object: the value of security shall be reckoned as significant when the realisable value of the security is less than 50 per cent of the

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Such NPAs may be straightaway
classified under doubtful category.
enriched_requirements.object: doubtful category

conditions: If the realisable value of the security
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) If the realisable value of the security, as assessed by the bank / approved
valuers / the Reserve Bank is less than ten per cent of the outstanding
in the borrowal accounts, the existence of security shall be ignored and
the asset shall be straightaway classified as loss asset.
enriched_requirements.object: asset shall be straightaway classified as loss asset

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An asset classified as loss asset following the considerations of paragraph 59
and sub-paragraph 60(2) may be either written off after obtaining necessary
permission from the competent authority as per the Co-operative Societies Act /
Rules, or fully provided for by the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: after obtaining necessary permission from the competent authority as per the Co-operative Societies Act / Rules, or fully provid

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
To bring down divergence arising out of difference in assessment of the value of
security the following shall apply in cases of NPAs with balance of ₹10 lakh and
above :
(1) The current assets and their valuation shall be looked into at the time of
Statutory Audit / Concurrent audit;
enriched_requirements.object: NPAs with balance of ₹10 lakh and above : (1) The current assets and their valuation shall be looked into at the time of Statutory A

conditions:
in case of larger
advances
enriched_requirements.object: of larger advances

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) Collaterals such as immovable properties charged in favour of the bank
shall be valued once in three years by valuers appointed as per the
guidelines approved by the Board of Directors.
enriched_requirements.object: three years by valuers appointed as per the guidelines approved by the Board of Directors

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Where entire overdues pertaining to all the credit facilities availed by a borrower
from a bank have been regularised by repayment through genuine sources (not
by sanction of additional facilities or transfer of funds between accounts), the
accounts may be upgraded to 'standard' asset category.
enriched_requirements.object: asset category

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Thus, the loan accounts
classified as NPAs may be upgraded as 'standard' asset only if entire arrears of
interest and principal are paid by the borrower.
enriched_requirements.object: asset only if entire arrears of interest and principal are paid by the borrower

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In such cases, it shall be ensured that the accounts remain in order subsequently
and a solitary credit entry made in an account on or before the balance sheet
<image>
date which extinguishes the overdue amount of interest or installment of principal
is not reckoned as the sole criteria for treatment of the account as a standard
asset.
enriched_requirements.object: accounts remain in order subsequently and a solitary credit entry made in an account on or before the balance sheet <image> date w

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
With regard to upgradation of accounts classified as NPA due to restructuring,
non-achievement of date of commencement of commercial operations (DCCO),
etc., the instructions as specified in the Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-
operative Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025 shall be
applicable.

Taking into account the time lag between an account becoming doubtful of
recovery, its recognition as such, the realisation of the security and the erosion
over time in the value of security charged to the bank, the bank shall make
provision against substandard assets, doubtful assets and loss assets.
enriched_requirements.object: assets, doubtful assets and loss assets

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All provisions required as per these Directions, whether accounted for under the
head "Bad and Doubtful Debt Reserve (BDDR)" or any other head of account,
shall be charged as an expense to the Profit and Loss account in the accounting
period in which they are recognized.
enriched_requirements.object: expense to the Profit and Loss account in the accounting period in which they are recognized

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
After charging all applicable provisions as per these Directions and other extant
regulations to the Profit and Loss account, a bank may make any appropriations
of net profits below the line to BDDR, if required as per the applicable statutes or
otherwise.
enriched_requirements.object: net profits below the line to BDDR

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall make provisions for NPAs as at the end of each calendar quarter
i.e.
enriched_requirements.object: as at the end of each calendar quarter i

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall make provisions for Standard assets as per the following
requirements:
Category of Standard Asset Rate of Provisioning
(in per cent) Direct advances to Agriculture and SME sectors 0.25 Commercial Real Estate (CRE) sector 1.00 Commercial Real Estate-Residential Housing Sector (CRE-RH) 0.75 All other loans and advances not included above 0.40
71.
enriched_requirements.object: assets as per the following requirements: Category of Standard Asset Rate of Provisioning (in per cent) Direct advances t

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions towards 'standard assets' shall not be netted from gross
advances but shall be shown separately as 'Contingent Provision against
Standard Assets' under 'Other Funds and Reserves' {item.2 (viii) of Capital and
Liabilities} in the Balance Sheet.
enriched_requirements.object: advances but shall be shown separately as 'Contingent Provision against Standard Assets' under 'Other Funds and Reserves' {item

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case a bank is already maintaining excess provision than what is required /
prescribed by Statutory Auditor / Reserve Bank Inspection for impaired credits
under Bad and Doubtful Debt Reserve or any other head of account / provisions
for NPA, additional provision required for standard assets shall be segregated
and the same shall be parked under the head 'Contingent Provisions against
Standard Assets' with the approval of their Board of Directors.
enriched_requirements.object: same shall be parked under the head 'Contingent Provisions against Standard Assets' with the approval of their Board of Director

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Shortfall if any, on
this account may be made good in the normal course.
enriched_requirements.object: the normal course

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The contingent provisions as per paragraph 72 shall be eligible for inclusion in
Tier II capital.
enriched_requirements.object: in Tier II capital

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall make an additional specific provision of five percent of the
outstanding debt in respect of borrowers, for whom a resolution plan has been
implemented in terms of Chapter IV-A of the Reserve Bank of India (Urban
Cooperative Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: provision of five percent of the outstanding debt in respect of borrowers, for whom a resolution plan has been implemented

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The
additional specific provisions shall be over and above the applicable prudential
provisions subject to a ceiling of hundred per cent.
enriched_requirements.object: the applicable prudential provisions subject to a ceiling of hundred per cent

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For accounts where repeated restructuring is necessitated in terms of Chapter
IV-A of the Reserve Bank of India (Urban Cooperative Banks - Resolution of
Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025, a bank shall make additional specific
provisioning of five per cent of the outstanding debt for each instance of
restructuring made under the aforesaid Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: of five per cent of the outstanding debt for each instance of restructuring made under the aforesaid Directions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
This additional specific
provisioning shall be over and above the applicable prudential provisions subject
to a ceiling of hundred per cent.
enriched_requirements.object: the applicable prudential provisions subject to a ceiling of hundred per cent

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The additional specific provisions maintained in terms of paragraph 89A and 89B
above may be written back upon the borrower paying at least 20% of the
outstanding debt with the bank, without slipping into NPA post implementation of
the restructuring, and without being subjected to another restructuring.
enriched_requirements.object: the borrower paying at least 20% of the outstanding debt with the bank, without slipping into NPA post implementation of the rest

conditions:
In case the
borrower defaults during the above period
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case the
borrower defaults during the above period, the conditions for reversal of
additional specific provisions, mentioned above, shall be tested from the date of
rectification of default.]
C.
enriched_requirements.object: date of rectification of default

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A general provision of ten per cent on total outstanding should be made without
making any allowance for Export Credit Guarantee Corporation (ECGC)
guarantee cover and securities available.
enriched_requirements.object: any allowance for Export Credit Guarantee Corporation (ECGC) guarantee cover and securities available

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provision shall be 100 per cent of the extent to which the advance is not covered
by the realisable value of the security to which the bank has a valid recourse.
enriched_requirements.object: of the extent to which the advance is not covered by the realisable value of the security to which the bank has a valid recourse

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of paragraph 75, the realisable value should be estimated on a
realistic basis.
enriched_requirements.object: realistic basis

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In regard to the secured portion, provision shall be made on the following basis,
at the rates ranging from twenty per cent to 100 per cent of the secured portion
depending upon the period for which the asset has remained doubtful:
Period for which the advance has remained in
Provision Requirement
'doubtful' category
(in per cent) Up to one year 20 One to three years 30 Advances classified as 'doubtful for more than three years' on or after April 1, 2010
<image>
E.
enriched_requirements.object: following basis, at the rates ranging from twenty per cent to 100 per cent of the secured portion depending upon the period for which t

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The entire assets should be written off after obtaining necessary approval from
the competent authority and as per the provisions of the Co-operative Societies
Act / Rules.
enriched_requirements.object: obtaining necessary approval from the competent authority and as per the provisions of the Co-operative Societies Act / Rules

conditions: If the assets are permitted to remain in the books for any reason
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If the assets are permitted to remain in the books for any reason, 100 per cent of
the outstanding should be provided for.

Provisioning Pertaining to Fraud Accounts
(1) The entire amount due to the bank (irrespective of quantum of security
held against such assets), or for which the bank is liable (including in
case of deposit accounts), shall be provided for over a period not
exceeding four quarters commencing with the quarter in which the fraud
has been detected;
enriched_requirements.object: a period not exceeding four quarters commencing with the quarter in which the fraud has been detected

conditions: Where there has been delay beyond the prescribed period
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Where there has been delay beyond the prescribed period, in reporting
the fraud to the Reserve Bank, the entire provisioning shall be made at
once.

(3) In addition to sub-paragraph (2) above, the Reserve Bank may also
initiate appropriate supervisory action where there has been delay by the
bank in reporting a fraud or provisioning there against.
enriched_requirements.object: action where there has been delay by the bank in reporting a fraud or provisioning there against

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Project Finance
(1) For project finance exposures, a bank shall maintain a general provision
at the following rates for the funded outstanding on a portfolio basis:
Operational Phase - after commencement of
Construction
repayment of interest and principal
Phase (in per cent)
(in per cent) CRE 1.25 1.00 CRE-RH 1.00 0.75 All others 1.00 0.40
<image>
(2) For accounts which have availed DCCO deferment and are classified as
'standard', the bank shall maintain additional specific provisions as per
Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative Banks - Resolution of
Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: at the following rates for the funded outstanding on a portfolio basis: Operational Phase - after commencement of Constru

conditions:
where financial closure has been achieved as on
October 1
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The provisions stipulated in sub-paragraphs (1) and (2) shall not be
applicable for projects where financial closure has been achieved as on
October 1, 2025, and such project loans shall continue to be guided by
the prudential guidelines prevailing before October 1, 2025 for the
purpose of provisioning, which otherwise shall be treated as repealed.
enriched_requirements.object: where financial closure has been achieved as on October 1, 2025, and such project loans shall continue to be guided by the

conditions: if these were sanctioned post October 1
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) Notwithstanding sub-paragraph (3), in case of any resolution of a fresh
credit event and/or change in material terms and conditions in the loan
contract in such projects, subsequent to October 1, 2025, the provisions
stipulated in sub-paragraphs (1) and (2) shall apply to these projects as
if these were sanctioned post October 1, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: as if these were sanctioned post October 1, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(5) Provisioning for project loans classified as NPA shall be as per the
instructions in paragraphs 74 to 79 of these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: instructions in paragraphs 74 to 79 of these Directions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
shall be estimated on actuarial basis and full provision shall be
made every year for the purpose in their Profit and Loss account.
enriched_requirements.object: basis and full provision shall be made every year for the purpose in their Profit and Loss account

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
State Government guaranteed Advances - State Government guaranteed
advance and investment in State Government guaranteed securities shall attract
extant provisioning norms on the basis of classification of assets into prescribed
categories as detailed in these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: on the basis of classification of assets into prescribed categories as detailed in these Directions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Advances covered by ECGC guarantee
(1) In the case of advances classified as doubtful and guaranteed by ECGC,
provision shall be made only for the balance in excess of the amount
guaranteed by the Corporation.
enriched_requirements.object: the balance in excess of the amount guaranteed by the Corporation

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Further, while arriving at the provision required to be made for doubtful
assets, realizable value of the securities shall first be deducted from the
outstanding balance in respect of the amount guaranteed by the
Corporation and then provision made.
enriched_requirements.object: the outstanding balance in respect of the amount guaranteed by the Corporation and then provision made

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The amount outstanding, in excess of the guaranteed portion, shall be
provided for as per the extant guidelines on provisioning for non-
performing assets.
enriched_requirements.object: per the extant guidelines on provisioning for non- performing assets

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Advances against gold ornaments, government securities and all other kinds of
securities shall attract provisioning requirements as applicable to their asset
classification status.
enriched_requirements.object: applicable to their asset classification status

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Interbank exposure of banks under All Inclusive Directions
(1) The interbank exposures arising from deposits placed by a bank with a
bank under All-Inclusive Directions (AID) and their non-performing
exposures arising from discounted bills drawn under LCs issued by a
bank under AID shall be fully provided within five years at the rate of 20
per cent annually.
enriched_requirements.object: five years at the rate of 20 per cent annually

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Innovative Perpetual Debt Instrument - IPDI)
which may be recognised as capital instrument under a scheme of
restructuring/ revival of a bank under AID, provision on the portion of
deposits converted into such instruments shall not be required.

A bank may recognise income on accrual basis only in respect of credit facilities
which are classified as 'standard'.
enriched_requirements.object: basis only in respect of credit facilities which are classified as 'standard'

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For credit facilities which are not classified as 'standard', including those
guaranteed by Government, income shall be recognized on actual receipt basis
i.e.
enriched_requirements.object: receipt basis i

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Notwithstanding paragraph 91, interest on advances against Term Deposits,
NSCs, KVPs, and life insurance policies may be taken to income account on the
due date, provided adequate margin is available in the accounts.
enriched_requirements.object: account on the due date

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Fees and commissions earned by a bank as a result of renegotiations or
rescheduling of outstanding debts shall be recognised on an accrual basis over
the period of time covered by the renegotiated or rescheduled extension of credit.
enriched_requirements.object: accrual basis over the period of time covered by the renegotiated or rescheduled extension of credit

conditions: where moratorium has been granted for repayment of interest
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In cases of loans where moratorium has been granted for repayment of interest,
income may be recognised on accrual basis for accounts which continue to be
classified as 'standard'.
enriched_requirements.object: basis for accounts which continue to be classified as 'standard'

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
This shall be evaluated against the definition of
'restructuring' 'provided in Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative Banks -
Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: definition of 'restructuring' 'provided in Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets) D

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank undertaking equipment leasing shall follow prudential accounting
standards.

The interest component
alone should be taken to income account.
enriched_requirements.object: account

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Such interest component taken to income account, before the asset became
NPA, if unrealised shall be reversed or provided for.
enriched_requirements.object: for

conditions:
If interest is not actually received for any reason in an account and the account
is to be treated as an NPA
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If interest is not actually received for any reason in an account and the account
is to be treated as an NPA, then the amount of interest so taken to income shall
be either reversed or provided for in full.
enriched_requirements.object: provided for in full

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Interest accrued in respect of non-performing advances shall not be debited to
borrowal accounts but shown separately under 'Interest Receivable Account' on
the 'Property and Assets' side of the balance sheet and corresponding amount
shown under 'Overdue Interest Reserve Account' on the 'Capital and Liabilities'
side of the balance sheet.
enriched_requirements.object: accounts but shown separately under 'Interest Receivable Account' on the 'Property and Assets' side of the balance sheet and co

conditions:
In case the accrued interest in respect of the borrowal account is not actually
realised and the account has become NPA
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case the accrued interest in respect of the borrowal account is not actually
realised and the account has become NPA, interest accrued and credited to
income account shall be either reversed or provided for in full.
enriched_requirements.object: provided for in full

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Accrued Interest on Performing Advances
i) Accrued interest in respect of performing advances may be charged to
borrowal accounts and taken to income account.
enriched_requirements.object: accounts and taken to income account

conditions: In case the accrued interest of ₹10

if the same is not realised by passing the following entries:
(Dr) P&L a/c ₹10
In case accrued interest is realised subsequently
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(Dr) Borrower's account (CC, OD loan) ₹10,000.00 (Cr) Interest account ₹10,000.00
ii) In case the accrued interest of ₹10,000/- in respect of the borrowal
account is not actually realised and the account has become NPA,
interest accrued and credited to income account should be reversed or
provided for if the same is not realised by passing the following entries:
(Dr) P&L a/c ₹10,000.00 (Cr) Overdue Interest Reserve Account ₹10,000.00
<image>
iii) In case accrued interest is realised subsequently, the following entries
may be passed:
(Dr) Cash / Bank account ₹10,000.00 (Cr) Borrower's account (CC, OD loan) ₹10,000.00 (Dr) Overdue Interest Reserve Account ₹10,000.00 (Cr) Interest account ₹10,000.00
enriched_requirements.object: / Bank account ₹10,000

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Accrued Interest on Non - Performing Advances
i) Accrued interest in respect of non-performing advances may be debited
to 'Interest Receivable Account' and corresponding amount credited to
'Overdue Interest Reserve Account'.
enriched_requirements.object: Receivable Account' and corresponding amount credited to 'Overdue Interest Reserve Account'

conditions: if interest is actually realised
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
account of a borrower 'Y' is
₹20,000/- the accounting entries may be passed as under:
(Dr) Interest Receivable Account ₹20,000.00 (Cr) Overdue Interest Reserve Account ₹20,000.00
ii) Subsequently, if interest is actually realised, the following accounting
entries may be passed:
(Dr) Cash / Bank account ₹20,000.00 (Cr) Interest account ₹20,000.00 (Dr) Overdue Interest Reserve Account ₹20,000.00 (Cr) Interest Receivable Account ₹20,000.00
enriched_requirements.object: (Dr) Interest Receivable Account ₹20,000.00 (Cr) Overdue Interest Reserve Account ₹20,000.00 ii) Subsequently

conditions:
If the accrued interest is not realised and the account
becomes NPA
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
ii) Similarly, a separate column should be provided in the loan ledger in
respect of performing advances for showing accrued interest taken to
income account.If the accrued interest is not realised and the account
becomes NPA, the amount has to be reversed or provided for.
enriched_requirements.object: loan ledger in respect of performing advances for showing accrued interest taken to income account

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Overdue interest reserve is not created out of the real or earned income received
by a bank and hence, the amounts held in the Overdue Interest Reserve Account
shall not be regarded as 'reserve' or a part of the owned funds of the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: or a part of the owned funds of the bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The interest receivable on the deposits placed by a bank with a bank under AID
shall not be recognised as income by the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: by the bank

conditions: If any advance
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If any advance, including bills purchased and discounted becomes NPA, the
entire interest accrued and credited to income account in the past periods, shall
be reversed if the same is not realised.
enriched_requirements.object: same is not realised

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In respect of NPAs, fees, commission and similar income that have accrued shall
cease to accrue in the current period and shall be reversed with respect to past
periods, if uncollected.
enriched_requirements.object: the current period and shall be reversed with respect to past periods

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Interest realised on NPAs may be taken to income account provided the credits
in the accounts towards interest are not out of fresh / additional credit facilities
sanctioned to the borrower concerned.
enriched_requirements.object: account provided the credits in the accounts towards interest are not out of fresh / additional credit facilities sanctioned to the

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
towards principal or interest
<image>
due), the bank shall adopt an accounting principle and exercise the right of
appropriation of recoveries in a uniform and consistent manner.
enriched_requirements.object: and exercise the right of appropriation of recoveries in a uniform and consistent manner

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall not book income on accrual basis in respect of any security,
irrespective of the category in which it is included, where the interest / principal
is in arrears for more than 90 days.
enriched_requirements.object: basis in respect of any security, irrespective of the category in which it is included

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Income on units of UTI and equity of All India Financial Institutions shall be
booked on cash basis and not on accrual basis.
enriched_requirements.object: basis and not on accrual basis

conditions:
where interest rates on the
instruments are predetermined
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In respect of income from Government securities / bonds of public sector
undertakings and All India Financial Institutions, where interest rates on the
instruments are predetermined, income may be booked on accrual basis,
provided interest is serviced regularly and is not in arrears.
enriched_requirements.object: basis

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Interest income recognition in respect of borrower accounts where
resolution plan has been implemented in terms of Chapter IV-A of the Reserve
Bank of India (Urban Cooperative Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets)
Directions, 2025 dated November 28, 2025, shall be on accrual basis.

For accounts specified at paragraph 53B of these Directions, interest income shall be recognized on cash basis.]
5 Inserted with effect from July 1, 2026, vide Reserve Bank of India (Urban Cooperative Banks - Income Recognition, Asset Classification and Provisioning) Amendment Directions, 2026.
enriched_requirements.object: basis

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The
directions, instructions and guidelines already repealed vide any of the
directions, instructions, and guidelines listed in the above notification shall
continue to remain repealed.

Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall
continue to be governed by the provisions thereof.
enriched_requirements.object: by the provisions thereof

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All approvals or
acknowledgments granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as
governed by these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: by these Directions
affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

conditions: if those directions
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may
be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or
punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or
guidelines had not been repealed.
enriched_requirements.object: enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation
of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time
being in force.
enriched_requirements.object: and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

conditions: if it considers necessary
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of
<image>
these Directions, the Reserve Bank may, if it considers necessary, issue
necessary clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the
interpretation of any provision of these Directions given by the Reserve Bank
shall be final and binding.
